aeo_readiness.summary: Berry Good Heating and Air has a basic foundation for AEO readiness but requires improvements in several areas to enhance visibility and engagement.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build a Google Business Profile (GBP) with positive reviews.
Optimize website content with location-specific keywords and phrases to improve local search rankings.

gbp_analysis.summary: No Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for Berry Good Heating and Air, which significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of a GBP means the business is missing out on local search traffic and customer engagement opportunities.
No customer reviews or ratings to build trust and credibility.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web, which affects local SEO.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms to ensure consistency.
Claim and verify the business on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and a Google Business Profile (GBP) severely limits the business's visibility in local search results.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Potential customers searching for HVAC services in Atlanta on Google and other search engines.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a GBP and generating initial customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a trusted local HVAC service provider by actively managing online reputation and citations.
